summary: O2 Academy Brixton scores 67/100 for AEO (moderate) and 75/100 for GEO (good). The page lacks all rich structured data — the single highest-impact fix available. No FAQ content was found, leaving the page unable to surface in featured snippets or voice answers.
quick_wins: Upgrade existing LocalBusiness schema to MusicVenue and add maximumAttendeeCapacity, image, sameAs (Wikidata/Wikipedia/socials), geo coordinates. ~30 min, +12 AEO points.
priority_fixes: [CRITICAL] Implement MusicVenue + Event + FAQPage JSON-LD. Estimated AEO impact: +14 points.
[HIGH] Build a FAQ section answering capacity, accessibility, transport, age policy, bag policy. Wrap in FAQPage schema. Estimated AEO impact: +12 points.
schema_recommendations: Replace LocalBusiness with MusicVenue (@type) including alternateName, maximumAttendeeCapacity, openingHoursSpecification, sameAs.
Add Event schema for each listed gig with performer, startDate, offers.
Add FAQPage schema with the top 6 venue queries.
Add sameAs array linking to Wikidata Q488029 (Brixton Academy), Wikipedia article, and official social profiles.
content_recommendations: Add a FAQ block answering: capacity, transport, accessibility, age policy, bag policy, food/drink rules.
Add a 150-word 'About Brixton Academy' section covering 1929 opening, conversion from Astoria Cinema, and notable performances.
Add explicit 'Capacity: 4,921 standing' as a labelled stat in a Venue Facts box.
internal_linking_recommendations: Cross-link from each event listing to the venue info, accessibility, and getting-here pages using consistent anchor text.
Add a 'Sister venues' section linking to other O2 Academy venues — builds portfolio topical authority.

summary: O2 Academy Islington scores 23/100 for AEO (critical) and 36/100 for GEO (weak). The page lacks all structured data, has no FAQ content, and provides no extractable answers for capacity, accessibility, or transport queries.
quick_wins: Add a meta description naming the venue, city and capacity (e.g. 'O2 Academy Islington — intimate 800-capacity music venue in North London').
Add visible NAP (Name, Address, Phone) text — costs nothing, immediately improves entity clarity.
Add capacity as a labelled field — answers the highest-volume venue query.
Add a 'Getting Here' section with nearest tube/bus — directly answers voice search queries.
priority_fixes: [CRITICAL] Implement MusicVenue JSON-LD schema with name, url, address, telephone, description, maximumAttendeeCapacity, image, sameAs. Estimated AEO impact: +14 points.
[HIGH] Build a FAQ section answering capacity, transport, accessibility, age policy, bag policy. Wrap in FAQPage schema. Estimated AEO impact: +12 points.
[HIGH] Add explicit capacity (800) as a labelled data point in both visible text and schema.
[MEDIUM] Add a venue history section covering opening year and significant events.
[MEDIUM] Add an Accessibility section: step-free access, hearing loops, BSL, wheelchair spaces.
schema_recommendations: Implement MusicVenue schema with all applicable properties: name, alternateName, url, address (PostalAddress), telephone, description, maximumAttendeeCapacity, image, openingHoursSpecification, sameAs, geo (GeoCoordinates).
Add Event schema for each listed event.
Implement FAQPage schema with top 5–8 venue queries.
Add sameAs array linking to Wikidata, Wikipedia, social profiles.
content_recommendations: Expand venue description to at least 400 words (currently ~180).
Add an 'About O2 Academy Islington' section covering opening year and notable performances.
Create a FAQ section answering capacity, transport, accessibility, age, bag policy, food/drink.
Add a 'Getting Here' section with tube/rail/bus.
State the venue capacity prominently in a Venue Facts summary.
internal_linking_recommendations: Add contextual internal links from event pages to venue info, accessibility, and getting here pages.
Increase internal link density — cross-link homepage, events, venue info, FAQ.
Use consistent anchor text — always 'O2 Academy Islington', never 'click here'.
Add a 'Sister O2 venues' section linking to portfolio venues.
